description:
A regional hospital receives nightly batch files from a legacy laboratory information system (LIS). Each batch file contains multiple HL7 v2.5.1 ORU^R01 lab result messages concatenated together. Create and deploy a NextGen Connect channel named 'Lab Batch Splitter' that processes batch files from /var/hl7_input (pattern: *.hl7) and splits them into individual HL7 messages. The individual messages must be written to /var/hl7_output using unique filenames.

Access:
- Web Dashboard: https://localhost:8443 (admin/admin)
- REST API: https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin, Header X-Requested-With: OpenAPI)
- Terminal is available for checking files.

Note: The paths /var/hl7_input and /var/hl7_output refer to the filesystem inside the NextGen Connect container.
